cases.name: index.html (sunset): terminal pane self-illuminated on light bg, solid rgb(13,17,23), title bar + LIVE dot + log stream + stats + prompt all visible, zero console errors
landing-d.html (Command Center dark): terminal reads native, seat granted orange highlight visible in log
landing-e.html (ambient dark): terminal pops against ambient bg, all stats + prompt legible
body.cls-q-active adds padding-right:320px at >=1280px viewport; hero chat dock pushed left, widget sits in clear right gutter (measured 20px separation)
below 1280px: body padding disabled, widget falls back to bottom-right corner 280-300px wide
title bar shows 3 traffic-light dots (r/y/g), 'cls.queue - /live' centered, green pulsing LIVE badge
$ watch -n1 queue/status command line in dim gray with green prompt
log stream: 5 lines max, cyan timestamps, dim white event text, orange positions aligned right, hl rows render in orange
new log line slides in every 3.8s, oldest line trimmed synchronously (no infinite-loop regression)
seat granted orange highlight fires every 5th tick + in seed sequence (verified visible on Variant B screenshot)
jitter fix: tickPos drifts 1-3 each tick, positions vary across log lines (#73 #72 #70 #68 #65 observed)
stats block: WAITING orange bold, ACTIVE green + pulsing dot, NEXT WAVE amber '5 seats - Mon 09:00'
input row: orange > caret, transparent native input, orange caret-color, enter-to-submit hint with <kbd> styling
BC-01 waiting=47 baseline (seed offset), active=3 (floor), log shows #47/#46/#45/#44/#43 variety
BC-02 waiting=500, active=42: orange 500 in stats, seat granted #1 orange at top of log, positions #499/#500/#498/#496 below
BC-03 waiting=9999: formatted as '9,999' in monospace, log positions #9998/#9999/#9997/#9994 all fit naturally
BC-04 waiting=25000 + active=9999 combined: waiting compacts to '25k', active '9,999' fits in monospace stats line, log #25000/#24998/#24996/#24995/#24993
email form submit: log injects 'validating ...' then 'code dispatched' (green), email form replaced by OTP form, hint shows 'code sent to <email>'
harness captured 6-digit OTP via /v1/dev/emails endpoint
OTP submit: log injects 'verifying code' then 'seat reserved #48' (orange hl), input zone replaced with green success pane
success pane: '✓ seat reserved' green header, 'you are #48 in line' with orange accent, 'check terminal.user@acme.com when it\'s your turn' dim subtitle
stats auto-update post-verify: waiting 47 → 48, localStorage persisted
red traffic-light dot closes terminal, body padding releases to 0 (page breathes back), 'cls.queue · reopen' chip appears with pulsing green dot
reopen chip click: terminal restored, body padding re-applies 320px, success state preserved
mobile 375x812: terminal falls to bottom-right 280px wide, body padding disabled, all elements legible (title bar, command, 5 log lines, stats block, prompt, hint)
desktop 1600px: right-middle anchor, 306px wide, body padding 320px, measured widget left 1255 vs content 1235 → 20px clean gap
reload after verify → poll fetches your_position via ?email=, enterSuccessState called, returning visitor lands on success pane without re-entering
backend 503 contract: 5 seeded users → POST /v1/auth/register returns {waitlist: true, cap: 5}
signup.html JS branch renders 'Join the waitlist →' link + stores email in localStorage (verified via eval-injected handler)
dashboard.html static HTML contains banner div, dismiss btn, profile link, emoji, ?welcome=waitlist query check
banner show logic + dismiss + history.replaceState all verified
GET /admin/waitlist (200) with seeded visitors + stats + config payload
POST /admin/tests/waitlist/run (200, ~5.7s) pytest subprocess returns 34/34 passed, cases serialized
full chain: reset → join → OTP → verify (pos 48) → admin promote → accept → activated

notes: v7.1.2 redesign: Option B Terminal Session replaces the washed-out SVG funnel.
Self-illuminated GitHub-dark terminal pane (rgb(13,17,23)) with monospace log stream, orange waiting + green active + amber next-wave stats, blinking orange caret input.

Log stream adds a line every 3.8s, trims oldest synchronously (fixed infinite-loop bug in addLine trim). Every 5th tick injects 'seat granted' orange highlight line. Jitter pattern drifts tickPos 1-3 so log positions vary (no more #73 x5).
Body padding-right: 320px on viewports >= 1280px so terminal sits in a clear right gutter. Mobile falls back to bottom-right corner, 280px.
Full lifecycle drives log messages inline: validating > code dispatched > verifying code > seat reserved #N. Success pane replaces input zone with green '✓ seat reserved' box.
